pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Andy Warhol "Brillo" 2022 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy present the Be@rbrick Andy Warhol 'Brillo' 2022 100% & 400% Collectible Set!  Standing at approximately 2.75' and 11.02' tall, this Be@rbrick set features a print of the cleaning pads 'Brillo' with the popular Andy Warhol style.  Don't miss your chance to add this Be@rbrick set to your collection today!
